dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Live check found 8 committed .claude/commands/specialist:*.md symlinks still target ../../../furrow/specialists/* instead of ../../specialists/*; install.sh also sets INSTALL_MODE but still runs CLI symlink bootstrap in source mode.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: tests/integration/test-install-source-mode.sh simulates detection and manually creates symlinks instead of exercising the real install paths, so it missed the 8 bad committed symlinks.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The specialist symlink interface contract is violated: not all committed specialist command links are source-local ../../specialists/ links.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: plan.json ownership for install-architecture-overhaul omits changed files such as bin/frw, bin/alm, bin/sds, .gitignore, normalize scripts, and many hooks/tests; the repo review artifact records this ownership gap.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: shellcheck exits 1 on deliverable shell surfaces, including SC2148 on multiple hook fragments and SC2295 in bin/frw.d/scripts/rescue.sh.
